title: Prettier Horses x Fresh Animations
description: Fresh Animations compat for Prettier Horses!
body:
[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compat for the pack Prettier Horses! Remodelled and Retextured horses with over 126 combinations!

original pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/prettier-horses).

There are also a few unicorn nametag variants, by naming different coloured horses "unicorn", or in dark oak forests.



Credit to FreshLX for their amazing Fresh Animations resource pack!



Compatibility

- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) MUST be installed and placed UNDER this pack in order for it to work
- This resource pack requires Optifine or Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features mods to    function!
- Entity Model Features is recommended as it works better with both packs
- This pack should be compatible with most packs/mods that retexture or add horse armors!
- This pack will not work alongside any other packs that edit or alter horse models or textures
